name: aurora-workspace-guard
description: Guard Aurora root workspace operations by enforcing repo boundaries, control-plane reading order, regeneration rules, and validation flow.

interface.longDescription: Use Aurora Workspace Guard to keep root workspace changes aligned with Aurora repo boundaries, generated-surface rules, and the supported validation flow before staging or commit.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this root workspace change respects repo boundaries, regenerate any control surfaces, and run the supported Aurora validation commands.
